name: Net Operating Loss Exception to DRD Limitation

eligibility.description: A corporation must have a net operating loss for the taxable year as determined under section 172.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: The 50% or 65% taxable income limitation on the Dividends Received Deduction (DRD) does not apply for any taxable year in which the corporation has a Net Operating Loss (NOL).
